---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
il_combined <- readRDS("data/il_combined.rds")
```

```{r plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
p <- ggplot(il_combined, aes(x = pct_college, y = turnout_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, color = "#1a3a5c") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#e67e22", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Education vs. Turnout in Illinois",
    subtitle = "Each dot represents one county, 2024",
    x = "Share of residents with a college degree", 
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", family = "Georgia"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia")
  )

p



```
